title: 2 Soft White Elli and Raff Baby Hooded Bath Time Towel 100% Cotton Baby Gift (Pink)
features: This pack of 2 Elli & Raff Hooded Towels is perfect for baby bath time
The soft and durable 100% cotton fabric is embroidered with a star pattern and features an Elli & Raff motif and is ideal for keeping little ones warm and dry
The hood is nice and cosy and is great for snuggling up in after bath time
With two towels you can always make sure you have one clean and dry to hand after baths
description: This pack of 2 Elli & Raff Hooded Towels is perfect for baby bath time.
